title: Expedition
description: Are you ready for your next big adventure? Take part in a two-day expedition or exploration, in the UK or abroad.

tips.title: You won't be totally on your own during the expedition (or exploration)!
tips.details: A Leader or other adult will supervise you throughout your journey. This will mean they'll check in with you at least twice a day (maybe more depending on what you've planned), and may watch you from afar or ask you to give them updates as you go.

tips.title: Planning made easy
tips.details: Why not use these handy [exploration](https://prod-cms.scouts.org.uk/media/18486/exploration-day-planner.pdf) and [expedition](https://prod-cms.scouts.org.uk/media/6912/generic-resources-expedition-planner.pdf) planner to help you on your way?
